multiple_sexual_partners.description: Whether a heterosexual adult reported two or more sexual partners in the past 12 months. 170 out of 2,673 subjects reported this behavior. Used in the plus-four method to compute adjusted sample size (n~ = 2673 + 4 = 2677) and adjusted proportion (p~ = (170 + 2) / 2677 = 0.0643).
